notes: Zapier polls. In OpenFn, use a cron schedule with a since-cursor column. Postgres can also push via LISTEN/NOTIFY, but Zapier does not use it.

triggers.name: New Column
triggers.description: Fires when a new column is added.

triggers.name: New or Updated Row
triggers.description: Fires when a new row is added or modified.

output.summary: Row from the watched table (schema-defined columns)

triggers.name: New Row
triggers.description: Fires when a new row is added.

output.summary: Row from the watched table (schema-defined columns)

triggers.name: New Row (Custom Query)
triggers.description: Fires when new rows are returned from a custom query.

output.summary: Row shape determined by the SELECT statement

triggers.name: New Table
triggers.description: Fires when a new table is added.
